headline: Franklin Resources, Inc. to Announce Second Quarter Results on April 28, 2026
summary: SAN MATEO, Calif., April 02, 2026--On Tuesday, April 28, 2026 at approximately 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, Franklin Resources, Inc. (the "Company") [NYSE:BEN] will release its second quarter operating results. A written commentary on the results will also be available via investors.franklinresources.com at approximately 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time.

headline: Is Franklin Resources (BEN) Offering Value After Recent Pullback And Mixed Valuation Signals
summary: Investors looking at Franklin Resources at around US$23.59 may be wondering whether it offers real value or just appears cheap on the surface. This article walks through what the numbers suggest about the stock today. The share price has delivered a 28.4% return over the past year. However, the stock is down 1.3% over the last week, 12.6% over the last month, and 0.9% year to date, which may leave you questioning whether the recent pullback is an opportunity or a warning sign. Recent...

headline: Franklin Resources to Acquire 250 Digital, Launches Franklin Crypto
summary: BEN plans to acquire 250 Digital and launch Franklin Crypto, boosting its digital asset platform and institutional investment capabilities.
